channel.title: PR Primespot – U.S. Breaking News, Politics and Business
channel.description: Stay updated with U.S. breaking news, politics, business, tech, and investigations, with real-time coverage, trusted analysis, and essential daily insights

item.title: EU Forces Google to Open Android to Rival AI Assistants and Share Search Data in Major Antitrust Move
item.description:
The European Union has ordered Google to open Android features to rival AI assistants and share search data with competitors under new Digital Markets Act rules
Read the full article: https://www.prprimespot.com/technology/eu-forces-google-open-android-rival-ai-assistants-search-data-sharing-2026
